justification: The diff correctly migrates JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) across all test files, replacing deprecated annotations (@Before/@After -> @BeforeEach/@AfterEach) and expected-exception patterns with assertThrows. It also adopts Java 21 idioms like pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted(). The pom.xml and CI configs are updated to Java 21. No spurious churn is present.
